final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a Japanese beauty brand "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact restraint level and layout execution are yours
Composition: must be a hero section with left column (text content), center subject (model), right column (product + stats), bottom benefit cards — exact spacing and grid is yours
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy environment with purple flower accents — exact set design is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, bright, feminine lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" (navigation), "今すぐ試す" (header CTA), "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" (headline), "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" (subheadline), "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" (feature badges), "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" (bullet points), "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" (CTA buttons), "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" (trust badges), "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" (stat cards), "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ" (benefit cards)
Constraints: must preserve all Japanese text verbatim, must include 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges, 3 bullet points, 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards, 2 product items (dropper bottle + box)
Avoid:
